summary: Added crash-recovery detection to `agt run`: when a feature's STATE.json has `status: "executing"`, the run command logs `[crash-recovery]`, resets any `in-progress` tasks to `pending`, preserves completed/skipped tasks, and writes `_recovered_from`/`_recovery_count` metadata. Also added orphaned `STATE.json.tmp.*` file cleanup in `harness-init.mjs`. Extracted the logic into an exported `applyCrashRecovery` helper and added 7 passing tests in `test/crash-recovery.test.mjs`.
